children.heading: Agency subgrants
children.label: a Agency subgrants
children.text: Based on the allocation amount computed under , the Secretary shall allocate to each State educational agency an amount necessary to make subgrants to State agencies under subpart 1 of this part.section 6432 of this title

children.heading: Local subgrants
children.label: b Local subgrants
children.text: Each State shall retain, for the purpose of carrying out subpart 2 of this part, funds generated throughout the State under part A of this subchapter based on children and youth residing in local correctional facilities, or attending community day programs for delinquent children and youth.
